description: A wide, oblong ceiling painting within an ornate gilded frame showing the interior of a theater. On a raised stage at the left, performers in period costumes enact a scene. The auditorium fills the rest of the composition with tiers of seated and standing spectators in various poses. A small balcony with figures appears at the upper right. The palette is dark and warm with golden tones, and the composition is arranged horizontally to fit the elongated decorative frame.
